overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a wizard character in dark robes walking through a snowy mountainous landscape at night. The character traverses rocky canyons and forested trails with a distant castle visible against a starry blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ravine opening to vista

events.description: character stops walking and looks to the left, surveying the surroundings
exits narrow rocky canyon into open mountain landscape

agents.ego_description: walking through rocky canyon, pauses briefly to survey surroundings, then continues toward open vista

entered.detail: steep rock wall forming the left side of narrow passage
steep rock wall forming the right side of narrow passage
bare tree branches silhouetted against night sky
large illuminated castle visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow rocky canyon with steep walls on both sides. The character walks forward through the snow-covered ravine, pauses around 9 seconds to look left, then continues as the passage opens to reveal a distant castle against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with castle view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along snowy mountain path with expansive views of distant castle and surrounding peaks

entered.detail: evergreen pine tree on the right side of trail
snow-covered mountain ridge extending into distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open mountain ridge with full visibility of the starry sky. The canyon walls fall away as the path opens to reveal expansive mountain vistas. The distant castle remains visible to the left while scattered pine trees begin to appear along the trail.

events.description: entering denser pine forest area with trees closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through snow-covered forest trail winding between pine trees and rock formations

entered.detail: dense cluster of evergreen pine trees lining the path
scattered large rock formations along the trail side

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a more forested area with moderate tree density. Pine trees line both sides of the path, partially obscuring the sky. Large boulders begin to appear scattered along the left side of the trail as the open mountain vista gives way to woodland.

agents.ego_description: walking downhill along rocky snowy path surrounded by large boulders and rock formations

entered.detail: cluster of massive rocks on the right hillside
distant valley visible through gaps in the terrain

segments.scene_description: The path descends through a rocky area with sparse vegetation. Large boulders and rock formations dominate the landscape, with the ground becoming more uneven. The dense forest gives way to open rocky terrain as the trail continues downward toward a distant valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into an expansive mountain vista that eventually descends into a rugged woodland valley. It begins within a narrow, snow-covered ravine with steep walls, moving forward until the passage opens to reveal a distant castle beneath a starry night sky. As the canyon walls fall away, the scene expands onto an open mountain ridge where the horizon widens and scattered pine trees first appear along the trail. The path then shifts into a denser forested area where towering pines partially obscure the sky and large boulders begin to line the way. Finally, the woodland gives way to an uneven, rocky descent dominated by massive stone formations as the trail leads downward toward a distant valley.
